start..validate: newData.hasChildren(['type','roomId','ruleset','rulesVersion','seed','tickRate','hostUid','members','players','settings','serverTime']) && newData.child('type').val() == 'game/started' && newData.child('ruleset').val() == 'pill-bottle' && newData.child('rulesVersion').val() == 'pill-bottle/2' && newData.child('tickRate').val() == 60 && newData.child('seed').isNumber() && newData.child('seed').val() % 1 == 0 && newData.child('seed').val() >= 0 && newData.child('seed').val() <= 4294967295 && newData.child('roomId').isString() && newData.child('roomId').val().length <= 128 && newData.child('hostUid').isString() && newData.child('hostUid').val().length <= 128 && newData.child('members').child(auth.uid).val() == true && newData.child('players').hasChildren() && newData.child('serverTime').isNumber()

$playerId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['seat']) && newData.child('seat').isNumber() && newData.child('seat').val() % 1 == 0 && newData.child('seat').val() >= 0 && newData.child('seat').val() <= 3 && newData.parent().parent().child('members').child($playerId).val() == true

$commandId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['type','playerId','epochId','clientSeq','tick','serverTime']) && newData.child('playerId').val() == $playerId && newData.child('epochId').isString() && newData.child('epochId').val().length <= 128 && newData.child('clientSeq').isNumber() && newData.child('clientSeq').val() % 1 == 0 && newData.child('clientSeq').val() >= 1 && newData.child('clientSeq').val() <= 1000000000 && newData.child('tick').isNumber() && newData.child('tick').val() % 1 == 0 && newData.child('tick').val() >= 0 && newData.child('tick').val() <= 1000000000 && newData.child('serverTime').isNumber() && ((newData.child('type').val() == 'input/move' && newData.child('payload/dx').isNumber() && (newData.child('payload/dx').val() == -1 || newData.child('payload/dx').val() == 1)) || (newData.child('type').val() == 'input/rotate' && (newData.child('payload/direction').val() == 'clockwise' || newData.child('payload/direction').val() == 'counterclockwise')) || ((newData.child('type').val() == 'input/soft-drop-start' || newData.child('type').val() == 'input/soft-drop-end' || newData.child('type').val() == 'input/hard-drop') && !newData.child('payload').exists()))

progress..validate: newData.hasChildren(['epochId','tick','lastClientSeq','stateHash','phase','serverTime']) && newData.child('epochId').isString() && newData.child('epochId').val().length <= 128 && newData.child('tick').isNumber() && newData.child('tick').val() % 1 == 0 && newData.child('tick').val() >= 0 && newData.child('tick').val() <= 1000000000 && newData.child('lastClientSeq').isNumber() && newData.child('lastClientSeq').val() % 1 == 0 && newData.child('lastClientSeq').val() >= 0 && newData.child('stateHash').isString() && newData.child('stateHash').val().matches(/^pb2-[0-9a-f]{8}$/) && (newData.child('phase').val() == 'playing' || newData.child('phase').val() == 'won' || newData.child('phase').val() == 'lost') && newData.child('serverTime').isNumber()
